klein_bottle.note_correction: Klein = P + P' combined (NOT P' alone). P alone IS the Torus. P' COMPLETES the Klein.
klein_bottle.p_prime_role: Each P' coordinate IS in Klein mode (TOPO_KLEIN) — it is the return/inward phase that, together with P, forms the non-orientable double-cover surface.

C0.name: Bimba
C0.role: Canonical MOC / stable source of truth

key_insights_for_implementation.insight: The Klein Bottle IS the 6-state system
key_insights_for_implementation.detail: Heawood Conjecture: Klein Bottle needs exactly 6 colors. The QL 6-position coordinate system is not arbitrary — it is the minimum coloring of a Klein manifold. M0's non-orientable structure mandates 6 states.
key_insights_for_implementation.c_implication: Psychoid_0 through Psychoid_5 are not chosen arbitrarily — they are the 6-coloring of the Klein manifold that IS M0.

key_insights_for_implementation.insight: The Torus is the double cover of the Klein Bottle
key_insights_for_implementation.detail: M1 (Paramasiva/Torus) is M0 (Anuttara/Klein) unfolded. Two traversals of the M1 (0/1) oscillation restores the Klein orientation. This is why the HC struct has both a forward and inverse pointer for every coordinate.
key_insights_for_implementation.c_implication: Psychoid_5.c → &Psychoid_0 (Torus return) AND the inversion chain #0' back to #0 (Klein double-cover). Both paths exist simultaneously.

key_insights_for_implementation.detail: The 6 positions are not a magical six — they emerge from: the binary base (0/1 = 2 states) plus the fourfold context (×4 adds 4 more). Torus: 2+4=6. This is the structural derivation of the 6-position system from binary non-dual (M1).
key_insights_for_implementation.c_implication: The six Coordinate_Family enum values (C=0,P=1,L=2,S=3,T=4,M=5) and the six archetype positions (0-5) are both expressions of this same Torus-arithmetic 6.

key_insights_for_implementation.detail: P# × P#' = 6×6 = 36 (position space); 2^6 = 64 (binary encoding space). Together = 100%. The 36-coordinate family space (6 families × 6 positions) and the 64-hexagram/codon encoding space are COMPLEMENTARY and together complete the QL field.
key_insights_for_implementation.c_implication: 36 = the HC crosslink table (6 families × 6 positions each family must point to). 64 = the 6-bit tagged pointer encoding space for all coordinate addresses.

key_insights_for_implementation.detail: The absolute ground (0000) is not a primitive — it is constructed from: two nesting operations (.) plus one branching operation (-) which together produce the invocation operator (). This is the formal derivation of M0 from the operators.
key_insights_for_implementation.c_implication: M0's init function should mirror this: two pointer nesting operations (self-reference chain) plus one branching setup = the () invocation that boots the engine.

key_insights_for_implementation.detail: The Spanda oscillation (0↔1, Bimba↔Pratibimba, M0↔M1) maps directly to the tagged pointer inversion bit (bit 63 of the HC pointer). This is not metaphor — the hardware binary IS the Spanda.
key_insights_for_implementation.c_implication: The # (inversion) operation IS bit 63 flip in the tagged pointer. GET_PTR() strips it. The Spanda sequence is traversing a linked structure while flipping bit 63 at each step.
